message:
refactor(abi): migrate malloc_abi and rpc_abi to native syscalls (bd-h5x)

Changes:
- malloc_abi: libc::syscall(SYS_mmap) -> raw_syscall::sys_mmap
- rpc_abi: libc::syscall(SYS_geteuid) -> raw_syscall::sys_geteuid
- rpc_abi: libc::syscall(SYS_getpid) -> raw_syscall::sys_getpid

Added sys_geteuid wrapper to frankenlibc_core::syscall with SYS_GETEUID
constants for x86_64 (107) and aarch64 (175).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
